title: The Hell
description: Something is watching… survive the darkness in The Hell.
body:
![titel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7729d34fe04417dfe4dc64f0b9c652471926ec9.png)

---

[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17e5d47afb1ec97eaf67b51e3922abe80f00bf06.png)](https://discord.gg/r5u6jwpHJY) [![curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85767d619d6e19ce7285fa1798c07c196575a0ea_0.webp)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/victorwinner/projects)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c39355dab93d38f00808074166bd07c6a1dad9a.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/VictorWinner)

---

Ready to descend into madness?  
**The Hell** transforms Minecraft into a terrifying survival horror experience where darkness is your greatest enemy and something is always watching.  

With unsettling mods like **The Man from the Fog**, **Mindful Darkness**, and **The Midnight Lurker**, danger lurks in every shadow.  
Explore abandoned structures, survive disturbing encounters, and try not to lose your sanity... 🕯️🔪  

Every sound matters.  
Every night is dangerous.  
You are never alone.

---

- Love creepy atmospheres  
- Enjoy challenging gameplay  
- Want something truly unsettling

<details>
<summary>💡 Note</summary>

Built for **Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge)**  
All mods are preconfigured — just install and start suffering 😄

</details>
